ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume_change" TEXT /* Change in trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock symbol */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is denominated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Healthcare, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., retail investor, institutional client, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "key" TEXT /* Metadata key (e.g., market_cap, pe_ratio) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata value (e.g., numeric, string) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the metadata value (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metadata_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Unemployment Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the economic indicator (e.g., macroeconomic, financial) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator (e.g., daily, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator value (e.g., percent, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the stock market */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, trend analysis) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users the report was shared with */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., retail investor, institutional client, data scientist) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., global, specific stock symbol) */,
  "expires_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission expires */,
  "revocation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for revoking the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
